stemHtml: Your ETO overhead the next waypoint is 15:46 Zulu, and ATC asks you to be there at 15:43 Zulu. How do you handle the FMS to meet the requested time?

options.a: Program a new speed into the FMS, which will calculate a new ETO that matches the time requested by ATC.
options.b: The FMS cannot recalculate ETO changes during the flight; you must manually calculate and adjust speed.
options.c: The FMS can only calculate times for the initial flight plan and does not support recalculations.
options.d: Ignore the ATC request, as the FMS is not equipped to handle inflight ETO changes.
